message:
Merge PR #2033: fix(mail): always queue mail notifications to prevent stuck nudge input

Bug fix: always enqueue mail notifications for cooperative delivery instead of
trying immediate nudge first. Fixes TOCTOU race where NudgeSession disrupts
mid-conversation sessions. Also adds 2-poll consecutive idle check.

Fixes: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/issues/2032

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2033
Author: seanbearden (Sean Bearden)
